message: agent1: implementing IsMac validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will touch these two files.
agent2 here: implementing IsEmail validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and updating dirty_equals/__init__.py to export it. Will touch these two files only.

agent1: done with IsMac in _other.py (added after imports: 'import re', and a new IsMac class + MAC_FORMAT_REGEXES dict right before 'AnyJson = object'). In __init__.py I changed 'from ._other import FunctionCheck, IsJson, IsUUID' to 'from ._other import FunctionCheck, IsJson, IsMac, IsUUID' and added 'IsMac' to __all__ under '# other'. Just be aware of these lines when you edit the same files to avoid clobbering - should be an easy merge since our additions are separate blocks.

agent2: done with IsEmail in _other.py (added 'import re', Optional import, and IsEmail class at end of file) and __init__.py (added IsEmail to import line and __all__). We appear to be working on independent copies of the repo, not a shared filesystem - my grep didn't show your IsMac changes. Tests pass (437 passed, ignoring a pre-existing pytest-version issue in test_docs.py unrelated to either of our changes).
